subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Dawning-Place of My Revelation, the Source of My inspiration, and the Manifestation of My Self [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه مشرق وحیی و مطلع الهامی و مظهر نفسی
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
